description: Grade 3 Christian Religious Education learning areas for values, Bible stories, and service.

learningAreas.title: Bible Stories
learningAreas.description: Listen to and retell simple Bible stories with clear lessons.

learningAreas.title: Christian Values
learningAreas.description: Learn kindness, honesty, respect, forgiveness, and responsibility.

learningAreas.title: Prayer
learningAreas.description: Understand simple prayers and moments of worship.

learningAreas.title: Service
learningAreas.description: Explore caring for family, school, neighbours, and the community.
